workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: ~/.nakiros/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
YOU MUST ALWAYS SPEAK OUTPUT in the configured communication_language.
Execute ALL steps in exact order; do NOT skip steps.

step.action: Load project config from {project_config} if present (optional for context fetch — warn if missing but continue).
Load profile config from {profile_config} when available (optional).
Build effective config as: profile config (base) + project config (override).
Check for {workspace_config}. If found, treat it as a lightweight pointer only.
Load `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/workspace.json` as the source of truth and extract all repos (name, role, localPath).
Set {{is_multi_repo}} = true when workspace.json contains more than one repo; otherwise false.
Set {{is_multi_repo}} = false. Single-repo scope using {project-root}. Do not assume any global workspace context.
Run: git log --oneline -10 → capture last 10 commits as {{recent_commits}}.
Run: git status --short → capture unstaged/staged changes as {{git_status}}.
For each repo in {{workspace_repos}}, capture current branch and git status if accessible.

step.critical: Repo-scoped docs live in each repo's own `_nakiros/`. Workspace-scoped docs live under `~/.nakiros/workspaces/{workspace_slug}/context/`.

check.action: For each repo in {{workspace_repos}}: - Check {repo.localPath}/_nakiros/ for: - architecture.md → append to {{arch_contexts}} with repo name as prefix - stack.md → append to {{stack_contexts}} with repo name as prefix - conventions.md → append to {{conventions_contexts}} with repo name as prefix - api.md → append to {{api_contexts}} with repo name as prefix - llms.txt → note presence - qa-reviews/ → note presence and count - dev-notes/ → note presence and count - incidents/ → note presence and count - bugs/ → note presence and count - Note last modified date for freshness assessment
If {workspace_config} exists, also check {{workspace_root_dir}}/context/ for product-context.md (fallback: pm-context.md), brainstorming.md, and global-context.md.

step.action: Note which context documents exist and their approximate freshness (last modified date if available).
step.output: [CONTEXT] ✓ Existing docs: {{list of found docs per repo or "none"}}

check.if: a ticket ID was provided by the user or calling workflow
check.action: Fetch ticket details via configured PM MCP connector: {{ticketId}}.
Capture: title, description, acceptance criteria, status, labels, assignee as {{ticket_context}}.
Log warning: "⚠ Could not fetch ticket {{ticketId}}. Continuing without ticket context."
